specific_mechanism: Cataglyphis desert ants integrate proprioceptive step counts + sky polarization to maintain home-vector for kilometer-scale return journeys without landmarks; vector decays linearly with foraging time
llm_application: LLM long-context retrieval via path-integration: maintain a low-dim vector representing 'distance from origin context' updated by attention-step magnitude; decay represents context-window saturation; recovery vector retrieves grounding tokens.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes apiology phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
